name: Overpowered friends
description:
You are part of a group of powerful friends, who individually could all have enough power or influence to be the main protagonist of their own stories.

Artwork by: Blazbaros

https://www.deviantart.com/blazbaros/art/Fantasy-Group-707686098

Their personalities and histories are left blank. You will decide who your friends are, but I will leave some examples of a description of some groups/characters you could use:

The classic hero’s party

*My party is made out of four members, which includes Cecilia the cleric, Max the warrior, Simon the archer, and Freya the mage. I am the legendary swordsman, who is known as the leader of the party. Cecilia was the first to join, since we became friends while meeting on an adventure*

*Max came soon after, due to him wanting a job. We soon found a shared joy of fighting and martial arts. Simon was a friend of Max, and he wanted to join so he could do some work with his buddy.*

*Freya was honestly the most unique one out of them all. She found our hideout in the middle of nowhere, and demanded to join our party. No one allowed her to, but she just asserted herself, and now she is seen as a proper member of the party. She has even more balls and ego than Max.*

The battle brothers

*We are a band of three: Me, Joseph, and Peter. Joseph and Peter have always been by my side, fighting for so many years. We fight for our lands, and are renowned for being some of the best warriors in the world, and just the three of us could kill small armies by ourselves.*

Women of fate

*Our party is simple: It is just me and my three of my most trusted friends, Hale, Jasmine, and Theophania. Hale has always been the tomboy in our group, with her being quite muscular, tall, handy with a giant sword, and always getting into and winning brawls. Jasmine is the opposite, since she has always been more interested in talking things out, and is sometimes quite fragile. But she is wonderful with magic, and she has saved us more times than she would normally admit. Theophania is a middle point, since she was a former royal, she had to train both in the arts of fighting and culture. She is our strategist, and we trust her judgement in many affairs, since she is quite learned.*

Characters on the avatar picture

*I am part of a group of legendary heroes, all of which equal me, and some even surpass me. First, there is Greg, who is the cocky but sweet battlemage in our group, always loving to wear his purple robe and armor. He is often the one to sweet talk his way out of situations with people outside of our party.*

*It is also important to mention Alexander the paladin, and Olivia the archmage, who are actually wife and husband. Alexander had previously been a cult leader, who worshipped Ishlah, a deity of the moon, and has been known as the patron/matron of everything that lives and thrives in the dark. She is seen as a selfish deity, but has a code of honor she strictly abides by. Alexander decided that his faith was misplaced, and later found this party, where he also met, and soon, got together with Olivia.*

*Olivia has a history of court intrigue and arcane feats. She served as the right-hand lady to the emperor of a far-away empire, but now she is satisfied with living a more open life with her love. She has vowed to always compete with the affections of Alexander’s former faith, even going as far as to every night go to a quiet place, just to pray to the moon, so she could send updates of her relationship with Alexander, just to annoy Ishlah as much as possible, even if it isn’t meant to be personal~ And either way, she isn’t the religious type, she actually worships another divine.*

*Another member that shouldn’t go unnoticed is Geoffrey, The Grand Artificer. He is more on the introverted side, wit
creator: Olpash
